name: Swedish Pancakes (Plattar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick.
2. Sift together the flour, salt, and sugar.
3. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the beaten yolks with milk, mixing alternately.
4. Stir in the sour cream.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
7. Heat a pancake pan (or Swedish Pan Cake Pan) and butter each depression, if using.
8. Pour about one tablespoon of batter into each depression.
9. Cook on one side until browned.
10. Turn the pancakes and cook on the other side until browned.
11. Serve immediately with preserves or applesauce.
